name: fable-mode
description: A documentation-only Codex plugin that adds one explicit $fable-mode skill for intent, output-form, grounding, capability, and depth control.

interface.longDescription: Fable Mode is an unofficial, original, provider-neutral Codex skill for explicit task framing, output-form selection, grounding stop gates, capability stop gates, depth control, and concise final reporting. It is documentation-only and adds no tools, servers, hooks, network calls, dependencies, or telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-mode to choose the right reasoning depth.
Use $fable-mode to fix this without over-scoping.
Use $fable-mode to keep constraints, output form, and grounding honest.
